cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. I need to figure out when Leslie could have gone to the beach. The problem says that the beach was closed after 10pm. So the beach is only open until 10pm. So Leslie must have gone to the beach before it closed. First, let me list out all the times when Leslie was seen doing other activities. Leslie woke up at 5am. Then Ashley saw them at the electronics store from 4pm to 5pm. Fixing their computer. Then Susan saw them walking towards the Statue of Liberty from 9pm to 10pm. So the beach was closed after 10pm. So after 5pm, when does Leslie have free time? The next activity is Susan seeing them from 9pm-10pm. So between 5pm and 9pm, Leslie is not reported to be doing anything. But the beach is closed after 10pm. So Leslie can go to the beach anytime before 10pm. But since they were doing other things from 5am to 9am, 9am to 11am, 11am to 4pm, and 4pm to 5pm, the only free time is from 5pm to 9pm. Because after that, from 9pm to 10pm, Leslie is walking to the Statue of Liberty. So between 5pm and 9pm, Leslie is free.
